text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sun May 25 12:39:56 2014
New Revision: 355205
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/355205
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r355205/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		ports/189568
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/devel/p5-Module-Extract/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/p5-Module-Extract/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-Module-Extract/Makefile	Sun May 25 12:39:51 2014	(r355204)
+++ head/devel/p5-Module-Extract/Makefile	Sun May 25 12:39:56 2014	(r355205)
@@ -8,9 +8,12 @@ CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Base class for working with Perl distributions
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Archive-Extract>=0:${PORTSDIR}/archivers/p5-Archive-Extract
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
